text:
Once upon a time, I had a cat whose favorite thing to do was watch the birds. We spent many hours sitting outside every day, watching various birds flutter, migrate, and build homes. We had countless chats about chick-outs and the strange way those little bluebirds sang.

We were so smitten we became a couple. Well, my cat and I. Occasionally I would sneak berries we found in the bush. Our friendship was so heartwarming that every summer we would have little bird sing-ins.

We lived forever because I stopped eating sugar. Instead, I would share berries. They're great with berries!

We passed away peacefully. That berry bush is filled with berries to this day. We love each other very much. Our story is ours alone, just like all things worth remembering...<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
